title: Start containers module
body:
This change picks up #20 and updates the containers start to use the
established api patterns.

Signed-off-by: Thierry Parmentelat <thierry.parmentelat@inria.fr>
Signed-off-by: Alex Schultz <aschultz@redhat.com>

comments.body: @jwhonce ptal when you have the chance. I'd like to build out the containers bit in the up coming weeks
